chapter_title.ar: باب الْأَكْلِ وَ الشُّرْبِ فِي آنِيَةِ الذَّهَبِ وَ الْفِضَّةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 19 – Eating and drinking in a vessel of the gold and the silver

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/68)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/68)
text: رَأَيْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَدْ أُتِيَ بِقَدَحٍ مِنْ مَاءٍ فِيهِ ضَبَّةٌ مِنْ فِضَّةٍ فَرَأَيْتُهُ يَنْزِعُهَا بِأَسْنَانِهِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Salih Bin Al Sandy, from Ja’far Bin Basheer, from Amro Bin Abu Al Miqdam who said,
‘I saw Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having been brought a cup of water in which was a handle of silver, so I saw him<sup>asws</sup> remove it by his<sup>asws</sup> teeth’.
en.sarwar: 6. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from Salih ibn al-Sindiy from Ja‘far ibn Bashir from ‘ Arnr ibn abu Miqdam who has said the following: “I saw abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, when a bowl of water was brought to him (the Imam) in which there was a patch of silver, removing it with his teeth.’”
